title: Faulty Trie Deletion with Auto Completion

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: Input is provided in the following format: [n, queries...]
statement.outputFormat: Output is a list of boolean values representing whether the auto completion suggestion exists in the trie after each deletion.

functionSignature.python: def solve(self, n, queries: list[list[str]]) -> None:

solutions.python:
class Solution:
	def solve(self):
		self.root = None
		self.isWordExist = self.isWordExist

def isWordExist(self, word):
		self.children = [None]*26
		pos = self.root
	sfor i in reversed(word):
			ch = ord(i) - ord('a')
			if pos.children[ch] is None: pos.children[ch] = TrieNode()
			pos = pos.children[ch]
		self.isEnd = True
		pos = self.root
	sfor i in reversed(word):
			ch = ord(i) - ord('a')
			if pos.children[ch] is None or pos.children[ch].isEnd == False: return False
			pos = pos.children[ch]
		return self.isEnd
# Test Case
if __name__ == '__main__':
	T = int(input())
	for t in range(T):
		N, Q = map(int, input().split())
		queries = [list(input().split()) for q in range(Q)]
		s = Solution()
		s.solve(N, queries)
		for i in range(Q):
			print(int(s.isWordExist(queries[i][0]) & (~s.isWordExist(queries[i][1]))))
